title: Report Results Clearly
description:
Clear reporting transforms marketing professionals from data collectors into strategic decision-makers. This Short Course was created to help marketers accomplish the critical skill of translating campaign metrics into actionable insights that drive team success.

By completing this course, you'll be able to summarize campaign performance effectively and prepare professional reports that demonstrate your marketing expertise to leadership and colleagues.

By the end of this course, you will be able to:
Summarize the components of a basic email campaign performance report
Prepare a one-page summary report of the latest campaign for team review

This course is unique because it focuses on the often-overlooked skill that differentiates high-performing marketers: the ability to transform raw data into compelling narratives that influence decisions.

To be successful in this project, you should have basic familiarity with email marketing platforms and experience interpreting simple performance metrics.
